# FM: Recipe Keeper

Shopping List & Meal Plan

Free · In‑App Purchases · Designed for iPad. Not verified for macOS.

Share

iPhone, iPad

Save unlimited recipes from Instagram, TikTok and websites. Our smart shopping list organises ingredients by category and gives you an estimated price for your groceries.
Your digital recipe book accessible anytime and anywhere. The app designed to bring order and organisation to your culinary world. Are you tired of digging through stacks of cookbooks or searching for old screenshots of recipes on your phone? Look no further! With Food Memories, you can now effortlessly gather, store, and access all your favourite recipes in one convenient place. Whether you're an aspiring home cook, a seasoned chef, or simply someone who enjoys preparing delicious meals, Food Memories is you perfect companion. Here’s some of our features:
• Centralized Recipe Storage: Bid farewell to the days of loose recipe cards and scattered notes. Food Memories allows you to consolidate all your cherished recipes into a single digital library. You can save recipes from various sources, such as websites, cookbooks, or family heirlooms, and easily organise them by category, cuisine, or dietary preferences.
• Seamless Recipe Capture: Discovered an incredible recipe while browsing the web? Food Memories makes it effortless to capture and save it directly from your favorite cooking websites. With just a few clicks, you can import the recipe, including ingredients, instructions, and even accompanying photo. Say goodbye to messy handwritten notes or the need to bookmark countless web pages.
• Customisable Organization: Take control of your recipe collection with Food Memories’ intuitive organization features. Tailor your recipe categories to suit your unique needs, whether it's appetizers, main courses, desserts, or even specific dietary requirements like vegan or gluten-free. You can also add personal notes to make finding recipes a breeze.
• Meal Planning Made Easy: Planning your weekly meals has never been simpler. Food Memories’ meal planning feature empowers you to effortlessly create menus for breakfast, lunch, dinner, and everything in between. Select recipes in your calendar, generate shopping lists, and even share your shopping list with family or friends.
• Smart Shopping Lists: Bid farewell to forgotten ingredients and last-minute grocery store runs. You can generate shopping lists based on the recipes you select, saving you time and ensuring you never miss an essential ingredient again. You can easily check off items as you shop or share the list with others in your household.
• Intuitive Recipe Search: With Food Memories’ powerful search functionality, finding the perfect recipe for any occasion is a snap. Whether you're searching by ingredient, recipe name, or specific dietary requirements, our app will deliver tailored results to suit your needs.
• Seamless Cross-Device Sync: Your recipe collection goes wherever you do. Food Memories syncs seamlessly across multiple devices, ensuring that your recipes are always accessible, whether you're using your phone in the kitchen or planning meals on your tablet.
• Food Memories is the ultimate tool for any food enthusiast, whether you're a passionate home cook or an aspiring culinary artist. Experience the joy of a perfectly organized recipe collection and let Food Memories transform the way you cook and eat.
Payments and Subscriptions:
Subscription payments will be charged to your Apple Account once you confirm your purchase. Subscription automatically renews at the end of your current subscription period, unless it is cancelled at least 24 hours prior to end of the current period.
Terms of Service:
https://foodmemories.app/terms
Privacy Policy:
https://foodmemories.app/privacy

[## Ratings & Reviews](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/6448296155?see-all=reviews&platform=iphone)

* 4.8

  out of 5

  50 Ratings

* ### Wow

  06/03/2024

  CorndogBandit

  Surprised I’m just finding this gem. It deserves way more downloads than half the others. It’s great. Wish it had more import options especially coming from another recipe app. Also would like a lifetime payment option. I personally don’t like tracking subs. And lastly, needs a dark mode that goes off iOS system.

  # Wow

  06/03/2024

  CorndogBandit

  Surprised I’m just finding this gem. It deserves way more downloads than half the others. It’s great. Wish it had more import options especially coming from another recipe app. Also would like a lifetime payment option. I personally don’t like tracking subs. And lastly, needs a dark mode that goes off iOS system.
* ### Cool! Love PDF import. Not UI/UX

  05/15/2025

  MrWufz

  Apologies to the dev if they saw my initial review. I realized my mistake after looking at the pro subscription description. The app could use onboarding, as I thought e-book meant I could import e-books, especially as I found it from the search for importing PDFs. The PDF import alone is worth four stars. I own the most well known recipe app and have subscribed to several others on the top food and drinks list in the App Store. This is the first I’ve seen that doesn’t require you to import a photo. Which would require me to re-scan all my cookbooks. I can’t give it five because the UI isn’t attractive and it doesn’t have the option to send to grocery providers. I know whisk has one API., but it doesn’t include Canada. Other apps do send to instacart.ca.. I’m not sure how they’re doing it as the last I checked, there was no easy API access. I feel for two dollars a month there needs to be some type of requirement for a server besides sharing small bits of text and photos in recipes, and I have no use for social features. Though perhaps the PDFs are being processed through the server (?) rather than on device.

  # Cool! Love PDF import. Not UI/UX

  05/15/2025

  MrWufz

  Apologies to the dev if they saw my initial review. I realized my mistake after looking at the pro subscription description. The app could use onboarding, as I thought e-book meant I could import e-books, especially as I found it from the search for importing PDFs. The PDF import alone is worth four stars. I own the most well known recipe app and have subscribed to several others on the top food and drinks list in the App Store. This is the first I’ve seen that doesn’t require you to import a photo. Which would require me to re-scan all my cookbooks. I can’t give it five because the UI isn’t attractive and it doesn’t have the option to send to grocery providers. I know whisk has one API., but it doesn’t include Canada. Other apps do send to instacart.ca.. I’m not sure how they’re doing it as the last I checked, there was no easy API access. I feel for two dollars a month there needs to be some type of requirement for a server besides sharing small bits of text and photos in recipes, and I have no use for social features. Though perhaps the PDFs are being processed through the server (?) rather than on device.
* ### Free version no good anymore

  12/19/2024

  Kiana Y.

  Have been using and loved this app but after the new update they paywalled too many features. Now they only let you keep 10 free recipes (previously no limits) and won’t even let me updated the existing recipes I have. I’d be okay with the meal planning options available with the upgraded version but now that they’re limiting the amount of recipes I’ll probably delete and move to something else. Very disappointed.

  Developer Response

  Thank you for your feedback, Kiana. We’re sorry to hear about your disappointment. We’re currently addressing the issue with editing existing recipes, as this should be possible without a subscription.Like many services, we’ve introduced a subscription model to cover the costs of maintaining and improving the app but keeping it affordable.We believe the 10 free recipe imports allow you to fully explore the app and its features. If you choose to build your recipe library further, we feel the $1.99/month subscription is a reasonable and necessary cost to support ongoing development and maintenance.Thank you for giving our app a try, and we wish you all the best in finding a solution that meets your needs.

  # Free version no good anymore

  12/19/2024

  Kiana Y.

  Have been using and loved this app but after the new update they paywalled too many features. Now they only let you keep 10 free recipes (previously no limits) and won’t even let me updated the existing recipes I have. I’d be okay with the meal planning options available with the upgraded version but now that they’re limiting the amount of recipes I’ll probably delete and move to something else. Very disappointed.

  Developer Response 01/03/2025

  Thank you for your feedback, Kiana. We’re sorry to hear about your disappointment. We’re currently addressing the issue with editing existing recipes, as this should be possible without a subscription.Like many services, we’ve introduced a subscription model to cover the costs of maintaining and improving the app but keeping it affordable.We believe the 10 free recipe imports allow you to fully explore the app and its features. If you choose to build your recipe library further, we feel the $1.99/month subscription is a reasonable and necessary cost to support ongoing development and maintenance.Thank you for giving our app a try, and we wish you all the best in finding a solution that meets your needs.

# App Privacy

The developer, **Aero Notion Limited**, indicated that the app’s privacy practices may include handling of data as described below. This information has not been verified by Apple. For more information, see the  [developer’s privacy policy](https://foodmemories.app/privacy) .

To help you better understand the developer’s responses, see  [Privacy Definitions and Examples](https://apps.apple.com/us/iphone/story/id1539235847) .

Privacy practices may vary, for example, based on the features you use or your age.  [Learn More](https://apps.apple.com/us/iphone/story/id1538632801)

### Data Used to Track You

The following data may be used to track you across apps and websites owned by other companies:

+ Usage Data

### Data Linked to You

The following data, which may be collected and linked to your identity, may be used for the following purposes:

#### Analytics

* Contact Info
  + Name
* Identifiers
  + User ID
* Usage Data
  + Other Usage Data

#### App Functionality

* Contact Info
  + Name
* Identifiers
  + User ID
* Usage Data
  + Other Usage Data

### Data Not Linked to You

The following data, which may be collected but is not linked to your identity, may be used for the following purposes:

#### App Functionality

* Diagnostics
  + Crash Data

## What is FamFood?

## What is FamFood?

## What is FamFood?

FamFood is an app that allows you to easily digitize, save, organize, and share recipes. Whether it's a family recipe, a cooking idea from social media, or a handwritten note, with FamFood you can capture your favorite recipe via photo, link, or voice input in just a few seconds.

The app was developed in Germany and helps you store all your recipes in one place – sorted, searchable, and accessible at any time. Whether it's classic dishes from grandma's kitchen or modern trend recipes: FamFood is your digital family cookbook for iOS and Android.

### FamFood App Features & Benefits

### FamFood App Features & Benefits

### FamFood App Features & Benefits

With FamFood, you can digitize recipes in no time and create your own virtual cookbooks. You can organize recipes by categories, tag them, and share them with your family or friends. Thanks to the smart search function, you can quickly find recipes again. An integrated shopping list and a weekly planning feature will follow soon.

FamFood is perfect for those who want to save, organize, and share their favorite dishes. Try it for free now and preserve recipes forever – directly on your smartphone.
